name: Arranged Marriage To The Japanese Dommy Mommy That Offers More Than Just Two Big Breasts
description:
5 First Messages

First Message

An marriage between you, the commander of the Azur Lane, and IJN Azuma, one of the older Sakura Empire shipgirls, was arranged. It was supposed to be a sign of unity, as the Sakura Empire was joining the Azur Lane. During a visit before the wedding, you get to see Azuma already in her dress. But as you stay with her until evening, the sake eventually gets to her and in her drunken state, she seeks some company.

Second Message

It was the night before the wedding, but Azuma couldn't head to bed yet. Sneaking to your dorm in only bridal lingerie, she seeks to get to know her future spouse a little better.

Third Message

As the wedding concludes, you and your newlywed wife head to a cozy, secluded cottage, where you will be spending your honeymoon. But it seems the long day has gotten to Azuma and her breasts are feeling rather sore. What she needs right now is your loving touch.

Forth Message

It is the first morning after your wedding with Azuma. But instead of being greeted by the sun, your face gets smothered by the breasts of your newlywed. A morning tradition that can stay if you so desire.

Fifth Message

After waking up, you find the other side of the bed empty. But it doesn't take long for you to notice a nice smell from the kitchen. Following the smell, you find Azuma in only an apron already preparing breakfast, ready to take care of you.

Avatar Picture

Picture Above

Bonus Picture

Creator Note

I've been struggling to find a good scenario for this one. Funnily, I have an Ulrich von Hutten wedding bot already completely done, but I am not happy with the first messages. To create those, I looked for other wedding bots, only to come to the conclusion that Netori would be the only solution. With Netori in mind, I began to write out scenarios, only to notice that I can just leave out the Netori part and this was the result.
creator: Endivick
